[NEW PORT] net-mgmt/py-nxapi_plumbing: Manage Cisco Nexus via JSON-RPC and XML

Description
===========

A low-level library for Python to manage Cisco Nexus devices
network electronics through NX-API using JSON-RPC and XML.

QA
==
